'''âp-r-f-n''' ('''kaparfenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antagonise|antagonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antagonise|antagonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-r-f-n
|-
! Lemma
| kaparfenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiparfenoko|thiparfenoko]] || [[word:jiparfenoko|jiparfenoko]] || [[word:shiparfenoko|shiparfenoko]] || [[word:kiparfenoko|kiparfenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoparfenoko|thoparfenoko]] || [[word:joparfenoko|joparfenoko]] || [[word:shoparfenoko|shoparfenoko]] || [[word:koparfenoko|koparfenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠparfenoko|thĂŠparfenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠparfenoko|jĂŠparfenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠparfenoko|shĂŠparfenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠparfenoko|kĂŠparfenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
